description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the image registry.gitlab.gnome.org/gnome/gnome-runtime-images/gnome:master, defines a global variable BUNDLE set to tvguide-git.flatpak and job‑level variables DBUS_ID=org.tabos.tvguide, FLATPAK_MODULE=tvguide, MANIFEST_PATH=org.tabos.tvguide.json, MESON_ARGS='', RUNTIME_REPO=https://sdk.gnome.org/gnome-nightly.flatpakrepo. Define a single stage named test and a job called flatpak that runs in this stage. The flatpak job caches the path .flatpak-builder/cache, and archives the artifacts ${BUNDLE}, _build/meson-logs/meson-log.txt and _build/meson-logs/testlog.txt for 30 days. Its script executes the following commands in order: flatpak-builder --stop-at=${FLATPAK_MODULE} app ${MANIFEST_PATH}; flatpak build app meson --prefix=/app ${MESON_ARGS} _build; flatpak build app ninja -C _build install; flatpak-builder --finish-only --repo=repo app ${MANIFEST_PATH}; flatpak build-bundle repo ${BUNDLE} --runtime-repo=${RUNTIME_REPO} ${DBUS_ID}; flatpak build app ninja -C _build test. No additional rules or deployment targets are specified.
